item.title: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the AI
item.description: In which I use the help of Henry Hazlitt to debunk fears regarding the proliferation of AI.

item.title: Review - The Second Sons Trilogy
item.description: In which I review ‘The Second Sons Trilogy’ by Jennifer Fallon, a great fantasy book series with quite the cunning protagonist.

item.title: Notes - Predictably Irrational, by Dan Ariely
item.description: My notes for the book ‘Predictably Irrational’, a decent if not repetitive book on behavioral econ with some weirdly iffy conclusions.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Ghassan Shahzad Contacts Email: ghass.shahzad@gmail.com LinkedIn: LinkedIn GitHub: GitHub Site: Site Location: Lahore, Pakistan Education Abu Dhabi International School; Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates Beaconhouse Newlands; Lahore, Pakistan 2014—2018 Roots IVY Internation School; Lahore, Pakistan 2018—2023 Research Experience No research experience provided. Work Experience No work experience provided. Projects This Website | GitHub Made with Hugo and GrUvTeX. Shahugo (ARCHIVED) | GitHub My own Hugo blogging theme. GrUvTeX | GitHub GrUvTeX is a LaTeX-inspired theme that utilizes the various gruvbox color schemes to provide an easy-on-the-eyes blog for large, technical (or otherwise) content.

item.title: Credits
item.description: This website uses some content created by others under permissive licenses. Here is the attribution for these works: Images Header Background Photo by Samuel Ferrara on Unsplash (Unsplash license)

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: My website and the theme it is based off of are open-source and freely available for you to examine. My website is not commercial, and (as of yet) it does not have ads. It does use cookies and local storage where necessary. I also use Google Analytics to track usage. My site is hosted on Github Pages, and you can find this hosters’ privacy policy here. Access Logs I host this website on Github Pages.
